must: Verify an active subscriber can access subscriber-only content.
Verify subscription status is correct on the account or billing screen.
Verify renewal, cancellation, or plan-change state is reflected correctly.
nice: Verify a previously expired user does not keep access incorrectly.
Verify entitlement updates appear without misleading status or messaging.

must: Verify billing details and subscription state display the expected values.
Verify checkout or payment-related errors show clear user-facing feedback.
nice: Verify failed or incomplete billing states do not grant paid access.

must: Verify the account screen loads without missing data or broken sections.
Verify account details, subscription details, or settings show the expected state.
nice: Verify navigation into and out of account settings works without session issues.

must: Verify the checkout flow reaches the expected confirmation or next step.
Verify invalid or interrupted payment states are handled correctly.
nice: Verify users are returned to the correct screen after checkout completes.

must: Verify paid-only content is accessible only for the correct subscription state.
Verify entitlement changes take effect on the relevant screens without stale access.
nice: Verify a sign-out and sign-in cycle does not restore the wrong access state.

must: Verify the mobile subscription state matches the user’s current purchase state.
Verify restored or active purchases grant the expected access in the app.
nice: Verify a non-subscriber is still blocked from subscriber-only content on mobile.

must: Verify sign in succeeds with a valid account.
Verify sign in fails with an invalid password and shows the correct error.
Verify the signed-in session persists after refresh or app reopen.
nice: Verify sign out and sign back in works without stale session behavior.

must: Verify a new user can complete sign up successfully.
Verify validation and error messages appear correctly for invalid inputs.
nice: Verify the new account lands on the expected post-signup screen.

must: Verify forgot-password or reset-password flow completes successfully.
Verify the user can sign in with the new password afterward.
nice: Verify invalid or expired reset attempts show the correct message.

must: Verify the user remains signed in across refresh, navigation, or app reopen.
Verify protected screens redirect correctly when the session is missing or expired.
nice: Verify stale sessions do not show the wrong account or access state.

must: Verify search returns expected results for a known keyword.
Verify selecting a search result opens the correct content or detail page.
nice: Verify empty-state and no-result messaging still behaves correctly.

must: Verify a normal form submission succeeds when all required fields and a valid Turnstile token are present.
Verify submission is blocked when the Turnstile challenge is missing or invalid.
Verify successful submissions still reach the backend or Payload form submission flow correctly.
nice: Verify the success and failure UI states remain correct after form submission.

must: Verify the main navigation paths still open the correct screens or pages.
nice: Verify back navigation and deep-link style entry points behave correctly.

must: Verify footer links and footer utility actions still open the correct destinations.
nice: Verify footer auth or settings links show the correct state for signed-in and signed-out users.

must: Verify the main smoke path still works: home, sign in, open gated content, account, and sign out.
Verify the app can navigate between key web pages without auth or routing failures.
nice: Verify one core subscriber journey completes without unexpected prompts or blocking.

must: Verify users can discover content from the affected listing or search entry points.
nice: Verify promoted or featured content modules still route to the correct detail pages.

must: Verify affected images load without broken placeholders, flicker, or obvious fallback text.
nice: Verify slow-loading states do not briefly show incorrect content.

must: Verify the affected content block renders the correct title, image, and call-to-action state.
nice: Verify layout and spacing remain correct for the changed content module.

must: Verify the affected CMS-driven content appears correctly in the consuming app or page.
Verify the intended content fields render without missing or malformed data.
nice: Verify content edits or configuration changes do not break nearby blocks or sections.

must: Verify the affected shelf or grid renders the expected cards and section title.
Verify clicking a featured card from the affected shelf opens the correct content.
nice: Verify shelf order, card spacing, and loading state still look correct.

must: Verify the affected video opens and starts playback successfully.
Verify playback controls and loading state behave normally.
nice: Verify playback access gates remain correct for subscriber and non-subscriber states.

must: Verify the video detail page loads the correct metadata and call-to-action state.
nice: Verify navigation from a listing page to the video detail page still works.

must: Verify gated content, prompts, and restricted actions match the user’s access level.
nice: Verify users without access do not reach playback or protected content unexpectedly.

must: Verify previously watched content and progress state still behave correctly.
nice: Verify watch progress updates after a new playback session.

must: Verify the gift purchase or redemption flow completes successfully.
Verify the gifted content or access state is available to the recipient as expected.
nice: Verify invalid or reused gift flows show the correct error state.

must: Verify the recipient or target user can access the expected gifted or unlocked video.
nice: Verify access is not granted to the wrong user or without redemption.

must: Verify the home page loads the expected key modules without layout or content breakage.
nice: Verify major homepage links still route to the correct content.

must: Verify the homepage hero banner loads without broken, null, or placeholder-like image text.
Verify the first hero slide shows the expected image, title, and click target.
Verify moving between hero slides does not flash incorrect content or alt-text fallbacks.
nice: Verify the hero banner behaves correctly on both desktop and mobile widths.

must: Verify the live chat screen or module loads and shows the expected signed-in state.
nice: Verify chat entry points and access requirements behave correctly.

must: Verify moderated chat states or restricted messages behave as expected in the affected flow.
nice: Verify normal chat behavior still works for allowed content.

must: Verify the live stream entry point loads and the player starts correctly.
Verify the live stream page shows the expected player, banner, and gating state.
nice: Verify moving between live stream and other content pages works correctly.

must: Verify items can still be added to and viewed from the watchlist.
nice: Verify removing an item from the watchlist updates the state correctly.

must: Verify offline mode or downloaded content behaves correctly when network access is unavailable.
nice: Verify returning online restores the expected playback and sync behavior.

must: Verify downloaded or locally available content remains accessible in the expected state.
nice: Verify content unavailable offline shows the correct restriction or fallback state.

must: Verify the affected user action still fires the expected analytics or tracking event if this flow is instrumented.
nice: Verify tracking changes do not block the visible user flow.

must: Verify the target content is visible and accessible only for the correct user state.
nice: Verify content gating messages remain accurate.
